audit_items.proof_trace: Property holds. The cost calculation at traits.rs::L1288-1299 correctly computes max_fee_per_gas * gas_limit + value + max_fee_per_blob_gas * blob_gas_used for EIP-4844 transactions. The validate_sender_balance check at L624 enforces sender.balance >= cost for all transactions when disable_balance_check=false (the production default per L885).
